item.title: 你什么时候可以宣布自己是全栈开发人员？ | When can you declare yourself a Full-stack Dev?
item.description:
托马斯·本特

发表于你好👋🏼

我想知道我是否应该将自己视为前端或全栈开发人员。 或者至少如何向公司展示自己。

然后，我问自己……什么时候你可以认为自己是全栈开发人员？ 成为一个人需要了解哪些基础知识？

例如，
我想要成为一名自称的 JavaScript 全栈开发人员，您必须至少了解一种前端框架（如Vue 、 React 、 Angular 、 Svelte 、 Astro等...），了解后端的基础知识及其特殊性，尤其是Node.js及其所有方面，知道一个或多个框架（我想到Express.js或Fastify ），知道如何创建 API 和数据库，并了解 MVC 的原理，以便建立一个好的架构。

如果有什么遗漏，请不要犹豫告诉我。

一旦暂停，thomasbnt 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，thomasbnt 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，thomasbnt 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 thomasbnt 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 thomasbnt：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 thomasbnt 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Thomas Bnt

Posted on Dec 2

Hello 👋🏼

I was wondering if I should consider myself as a front-end or full-stack developer. Or at least how to present myself to companies.

And then, I asked myself... at what moment can you consider yourself a full-stack developer? What are the basics to know to become one?

For example,
I suppose that to be a self-proclaimed full-stack developer in JavaScript, you have to know at least one front-end framework (like Vue, React, Angular, Svelte, Astro etc...), know the basics of the backend and its specificities, especially Node.js and all its aspects, know one or more frameworks (I think of Express.js or Fastify), know how to create an API and databases, and know the principle of MVC in order to set up a good architecture.

If there is something missing, don't hesitate to tell me.

Michael Tharrington (he/him) - Nov 11

Once suspended, thomasbnt will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, thomasbnt will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by thomasbnt will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If thomasbnt is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.title: 本周你的胜利是什么？ | What was your win this week?
item.description:
发表于嘿伙计！ 希望大家周五过得愉快，周末也过得愉快！

回顾过去的一周，您为完成什么事情感到自豪？

所有的胜利都很重要 — 无论大小 🎉

开始一个新项目

  • 修复一个棘手的错误
  • 和你的朋友一起跳舞！ 开个玩笑，这是个人喜好。 但是你可以在你的设置中更改你的主题、字体等。

    你知道的越多。 苏拉杰维斯瓦卡玛 - 一旦暂停，michaeltharrington 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

    • 解除暂停后，michaeltharrington 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦取消发布，michaeltharrington 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 michaeltharrington 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 michaeltharrington 的方法：

    报告其他不当行为

    取消标记 michaeltharrington 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



    原文:

    Michael Tharrington (he/him)

    Posted on Dec 2

    Hey folks! 👋

    Hope y'all all are having a fantastic Friday and that you enjoy your weekends!

    Looking back on this past week, what was something you were proud of accomplishing?

    All wins count — big or small 🎉

    Examples of 'wins' include:

    • Starting a new project
    • Fixing a tricky bug
    • Dancing with your friends! 🕺

    Just kidding, it's a personal preference. But you can change your theme, font, etc. in your settings.

    The more you know. 🌈

    Suraj Vishwakarma - Oct 10

item.title: SQL 中的可扩展作业队列 (YugabyteDB) | Scalable Job Queue in SQL (YugabyteDB)
item.description:
您可以使用 SQL 数据库来实现事件驱动设计的队列。 您可以使用分布式 SQL数据库来保持其可扩展性。 这是 YugabyteDB（开源，PostgreSQL 兼容）的示例。

首先，正如我看到您问为什么使用 SQL 数据库而不是专门构建的队列服务一样，让我给出一个原因。 你很少只是为了好玩而出队，就像我在这里做的那样。 在现实生活中，你有一排作业要处理，它们的处理可能会更新一些数据库。 将队列放在数据库中可以避免远程服务调用并保持事务性：如果作业处理未完成，它会保留在队列中，您还可以在队列中更新状态。 您仍然拥有异步处理的优势，而不会增加更多的复杂性。 如果一个组件发生故障，您想解耦以保持弹性吗？ 使用分布式 SQL 数据库，所有这些在节点关闭时继续工作，对故障具有弹性。

范围分片队列表

这是我的工作队列表：

 create extension if not exists pgcrypto ; create table job_queue ( primary key ( id asc ), id text default gen_random_uuid (), payload jsonb ) split at values ( ( '20000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ), ( '40000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ), ( '60000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ), ( '80000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ), ( 'a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ), ( 'c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ), ( 'e0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ) ) ;

我只使用一个id作为主键，它是我从 UUID 生成的（唯一且简单）但作为文本（因为我将定义范围）。 通常，您应该将 UUID 存储为uuid数据类型，但这是一个例外。
我在这里定义了范围分片 ( asc ) 并将其分成 8 个片。

我的目标是获取一个作业id ，锁定它，处理它的payload ，然后将其从队列中删除。 我想并行处理多个，然后我将select ... for update skip lock以便它使用第一个不被另一个线程处理的。 为了分发这个拾取，我想从一个随机id开始。 以下视图返回所有行，但从随机位置开始，因为 UNION ALL 分支是按顺序连接的：

 create or replace view job_fanout as with fanout as ( select gen_random_uuid ():: text id ), queue as ( select * from job_queue where id >= ( select fanout . id from fanout ) union all select * from job_queue where id < ( select fanout . id from fanout ) ) select * from queue ;

我将使用limit 1进行查询，以便大多数时候只执行第一个分支。 如果我们在id范围的末尾， union all就在那里环绕。

使用 FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 1 出队

每个线程将从该队列中选取一个id ，处理它，并将其从队列中移除：

 cat > / tmp / dequeue . sql << 'CAT' begin transaction isolation level read committed ; select id from job_fanout for update skip locked limit 1 \ gset select pg_sleep ( 1 ); delete from job_queue where id = ':id' ; commit ; CAT

为了模拟长时间的处理，我pg_sleep(1)以便每次执行都在第二个。 我的目标是我可以同时运行多个线程，并且每个线程不会超过一秒，因为在出​​队机制上没有争用。

测试数据

对于我的测试，我插入了一百万个工作：

 insert into job_queue ( payload ) select to_jsonb ( row ( generate_series ( 1 , 1000000 ) , now () ));

检查可扩展性

我用我的ybwr.sql脚本检查，从job_fanout视图读取一行仅从一个表读取：

 \ ! curl - s https : // raw . githubusercontent . com / FranckPachot / ybdemo / main / docker / yb - lab / client / ybwr . sql | grep - v ' \w atch' > ybwr . sql \ i ybwr . sql yugabyte => execute snap_reset ; ybwr metrics -------------- ( 0 rows ) yugabyte => select id from job_fanout for update skip locked limit 1 ; id -------------------------------------- 99 bd0f77 - a1be - 4182 - 85 c4 - 952 b947fd489 ( 1 row ) yugabyte => execute snap_table ; rocksdb_seek | rocksdb_next | rocksdb_insert | dbname / relname / tserver / tabletid / leader --------------+--------------+----------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1 | | | yugabyte job_queue range : [ DocKey ([], [ 80000000 - 0000 - 0000 - 0000 - 000000000000 ]), DocKey ([], [ a0000000 - 0000 - 0000 - 0000 - 000000000000 ])) L 10 . 0 . 0 . 141 ( 1 row )

这已经从平板电脑读取99bd0f77-a1be-4182-85c4-952b947fd489 ，范围从80000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000到a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000到seek() 。 多个线程会读取不同的 tablet，在每个 tablet 中寻找不同的位置，如果该行已被并发线程锁定，则会读取下一个。 这是对随机行的最有效访问。

执行计划也显示了这一点：

 yugabyte =# explain ( costs off , analyze ) select id from job_fanout for update skip locked limit 1 ; QUERY PLAN ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -------- Limit ( actual time = 4 . 004 .. 4 . 006 rows = 1 loops = 1 ) -> LockRows ( actual time = 4 . 004 .. 4 . 004 rows = 1 loops = 1 ) -> Subquery Scan on job_fanout ( actual time = 4 . 003 .. 4 . 003 rows = 1 loops = 1 ) -> CTE Scan on queue ( actual time = 3 . 999 .. 3 . 999 rows = 1 loops = 1 ) CTE fanout -> Result ( actual time = 0 . 016 .. 0 . 016 rows = 1 loops = 1 ) CTE queue -> Append ( actual time = 3 . 997 .. 3 . 997 rows = 1 loops = 1 ) -> Index Scan using job_queue_pkey on job_queue ( actual time = 3 . 997 .. 3 . 997 rows = 1 loops = 1 ) Index Cond : ( id >= $ 1 ) InitPlan 2 ( returns $ 1 ) -> CTE Scan on fanout ( actual time = 0 . 018 .. 0 . 019 rows = 1 loops = 1 ) -> Index Scan using job_queue_pkey on job_queue job_queue_1 ( never executed ) Index Cond : ( id < $ 2 ) InitPlan 3 ( returns $ 2 ) -> CTE Scan on fanout fanout_1 ( never executed ) Planning Time : 0 . 185 ms Execution Time : 4 . 068 ms Peak Memory Usage : 96 kB ( 19 rows )

读提交

我检查有效隔离级别以确保我已经使用--yb_enable_read_committed_isolation=true启动了 YugabyteDB：

 yugabyte =# show yb_effective_transaction_isolation_level ; yb_effective_transaction_isolation_level ------------------------------------------ read committed ( 1 row )

我将运行我在上面创建的dequeue.sql脚本，从pgbench运行它从 500 个线程，持续 1000 秒。 由于每个作业需要 1 秒（ pg_sleep(1) ），我预计它会处理 500000 个作业。 当然，我在这里使我的小型客户端 VM 饱和，这需要更长的时间，但我的目标是确保平均延迟不超过一秒。

 pgbench -T 1000 -c 500 -nf /tmp/dequeue

使用 15 个线程处理 SELECT FOR UPDATE

剩余的作业 (1000000-418943=581057) 可以从 15 个线程中处理，每个线程处理 38783 个作业。 在这里没关系，因为我将在没有pg_sleep()和没有delete的情况下运行它以仅验证 SELECT FOR UPDATE 的可伸缩性。

 cat > /tmp/dequeue.sql << ' CAT ' begin transaction isolation level read committed; select id from job_fanout for update skip locked limit 1; commit; CAT pgbench -t 38783 -c 15 -nf /tmp/dequeue.sql

在运行时，我可以检查读取操作是否已分发：

在这个集群上，我每秒锁定 1500 个事务，并保持个位数的延迟（9.9 毫秒）：


您可以使用 DELETE 语句运行相同的操作，并查看所有作业的处理都没有“找不到行”错误，并且没有重试。


原文:

You can use a SQL database to implement a queue for event-driven design. And you can use a Distributed SQL database to keep it scalable. Here is an example on YugabyteDB (Open Source, PostgreSQL-compatible).

First, as I see you asking why using a SQL database and not a purpose-built queuing service, let me give a reason for that. You rarely dequeue just for the fun of it, like I'm doing here. In real life, you have a queue of jobs to process, and their processing will probably update some database. Having the queue in the database avoids remote service calls and keeps this transactional: if the job processing doesn't complete, it stays on the queue, where you can also update a status. You sill have the advantages of asynchronous processing, without adding more complexity. You want to de-couple to be resilient if one component fails? With a Distributed SQL database, all this continues to work when a node is down, resilient to failure.

Range sharded queue table

Here is my job queue table:

create extension if not exists pgcrypto;
create table job_queue ( primary key(id asc), id text default gen_random_uuid(), payload jsonb
) split at values ( ('20000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'), ('40000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'), ('60000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'), ('80000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'), ('a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'), ('c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'), ('e0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000')
) ;

I use only an id as the primary key, which I generate from a UUID (to be unique and easy) but as a text (because I'll define ranges). Generally, you should store an UUID as uuid datatype, but this is an exception.
I define range sharding (asc) and split it into 8 tablets here.

Fanout view to distribute reads and writes

My goal is to pick-up an job id, to lock it, process its payload, and delete it from the queue. I want to process multiple ones in parallel, then I'll select ... for update skip lock so that it takes the first one not being processed by another thread. To distribute this pick-up, I want to start from a random id. The following view returns all rows, but starting at a random place because the UNION ALL branches are concatenated in order:

create or replace view job_fanout as
with fanout as ( select gen_random_uuid()::text id
),
queue as (
select * from job_queue where id >= (select fanout.id from fanout)
union all
select * from job_queue where id < (select fanout.id from fanout)
)
select * from queue;

I'll query this with limit 1 so that most of the time only the first branch is executed. The union all is there to wrap around if we are at the end if the id range.

Dequeuing with FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 1

Each thread will pick-up one id from this queue, process it, and remove it from the queue:

cat > /tmp/dequeue.sql <<'CAT'
begin transaction isolation level read committed;
select id from job_fanout for update skip locked limit 1
\gset
select pg_sleep(1);
delete from job_queue where id=':id';
commit;
CAT

To simulate a long processing, I pg_sleep(1) so that each execution takes on second. My goal is that I can run multiple threads concurrently, and each will not take more than one second because there's no contention on the de-queuing mechanism.

Test data

For my test, I insert one million jobs:

insert into job_queue(payload) select to_jsonb(row( generate_series(1,1000000) , now() ));

Check the scalability

I check, with my ybwr.sql script, that reading one row from the job_fanout view reads from one table only:

\! curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/FranckPachot/ybdemo/main/docker/yb-lab/client/ybwr.sql | grep -v '\watch' > ybwr.sql
\i ybwr.sql
yugabyte=> execute snap_reset; ybwr metrics
--------------
(0 rows) yugabyte=> select id from job_fanout for update skip locked limit 1; id
-------------------------------------- 99bd0f77-a1be-4182-85c4-952b947fd489
(1 row) yugabyte=> execute snap_table; rocksdb_seek | rocksdb_next | rocksdb_insert | dbname / relname / tserver / tabletid / leader
--------------+--------------+----------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1 | | | yugabyte job_queue range: [DocKey([], [80000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000]), DocKey([], [a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000])) L 10.0.0.141
(1 row)

This has read 99bd0f77-a1be-4182-85c4-952b947fd489 from the tablet that ranges from 80000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 to a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 with only one seek() into the LSM-Tree. Multiple threads would have read different tablets, seek to different place in each tablet, and if the row was already locked by a concurrent thread, would have read the next one. This is the most efficient access to a random row.

The execution plan shows this as well:

yugabyte=# explain (costs off, analyze) select id from job_fanout for update skip locked limit 1; QUERY PLAN ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-------- Limit (actual time=4.004..4.006 rows=1 loops=1) -> LockRows (actual time=4.004..4.004 rows=1 loops=1) -> Subquery Scan on job_fanout (actual time=4.003..4.003 rows=1 loops=1) -> CTE Scan on queue (actual time=3.999..3.999 rows=1 loops=1) CTE fanout -> Result (actual time=0.016..0.016 rows=1 loops=1) CTE queue -> Append (actual time=3.997..3.997 rows=1 loops=1) -> Index Scan using job_queue_pkey on job_queue (actual time=3.997..3.997 rows=1 loops=1) Index Cond: (id >= $1) InitPlan 2 (returns $1) -> CTE Scan on fanout (actual time=0.018..0.019 rows=1 loops=1) -> Index Scan using job_queue_pkey on job_queue job_queue_1 (never executed) Index Cond: (id < $2) InitPlan 3 (returns $2) -> CTE Scan on fanout fanout_1 (never executed) Planning Time: 0.185 ms Execution Time: 4.068 ms Peak Memory Usage: 96 kB
(19 rows)

Read committed

I check the effective isolation level to be sure that I've started YugabyteDB with --yb_enable_read_committed_isolation=true:

yugabyte=# show yb_effective_transaction_isolation_level; yb_effective_transaction_isolation_level
------------------------------------------ read committed
(1 row)

With 500 threads processing each job in 1 second

I'll run the dequeue.sql script I've created above, from pgbench to run it from 500 threads, for 1000 seconds. As each job takes 1 second (pg_sleep(1)), I can expect that it processes 500000 jobs. Of course, I'm saturating my small client VM here and it will take longer but my goal is to be sure that the average latency is not far from one second.

pgbench -T 1000 -c 500 -nf /tmp/dequeue

418943 have been processed with an average of 1.1 seconds which shows the scalability: dequeuing from 500 threads did not increase the response time.

With 15 threads processing the SELECT FOR UPDATE

The remaining jobs (1000000-418943=581057) can be processed from 15 threads taking 38783 job each. Here it doesn't matter because I'll run that without pg_sleep() and without delete to verify the scalability of the SELECT FOR UPDATE only.

cat > /tmp/dequeue.sql <<'CAT'
begin transaction isolation level read committed;
select id from job_fanout for update skip locked limit 1;
commit;
CAT pgbench -t 38783 -c 15 -nf /tmp/dequeue.sql

While this is running, I can check that read operations are distributed:

On this cluster, I locked 1500 transactions per second staying at single-digit latency (9.9 milliseconds):


You can run the same with the DELETE statement and see that all jobs are processed without "row not found" error, and no retries.
item.author: franckpachot

item.title: 第 93 次 TC39 会议的更新 | Updates from the 93rd TC39 meeting
item.description:
发表于议程上有几个项目，这篇文章重点介绍功能提案及其在 2022 年 11 月 29 日至 12 月 1 日举行的会议上取得的进展

第 4 阶段：

  • 国际枚举 API ：返回支持的选项值，例如时区、日历、编号系统、货币、单位

第三阶段：

第二阶段：

阶段1：

  • 里夫基·安德里亚托—— 一旦暂停，hemanth 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，hemanth 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，hemanth 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 hemanth 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 hemanth 的方法：

报告其他不当行为

不屈不挠的 hemanth 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

hemanth.hm

Posted on Dec 2

There were several items on the agenda, this post focuses on feature proposals and their progress from the meeting that was held between 29th November to 1st December 2022

Stage 4:

  • Intl Enumeration API: Return supported values of options, such as timeZone, calendars, numberingSystems, currencies, units

Stage 3:

Stage 2:

Stage 1:

  • Mass Proxy Revocation: Proposal for revoking proxies en masse.

  • Intl Era and MonthCode: To specify necessary details about era, eraYear and monthCode usage with Temporal in internationalization setting (for calendars other than "iso8601").

  • Intl.MessageResource: This proposal aims to make it easier to localize the web, increasing the openness and accessibility of the web for speakers of all languages.

@gnumanth

Rifki Andriyanto - Nov 22

Once suspended, hemanth will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, hemanth will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by hemanth will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If hemanth is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.title: Discussão sobre o Advent of Code 2022 - Dia 2: Sequência de condições | Discussão sobre o Advent of Code 2022 - Dia 2: Sequência de condições
item.description:
例子：

 if oponente == 'A' and voce == 'X' : score += 0 elif oponente == 'A' and voce == 'Y' : score += 0 elif oponente == 'A' and voce == 'Z' : score += 0 elif oponente == 'B' and voce == 'X' : score += 0 elif oponente == 'B' and voce == 'Y' : score += 0 elif oponente == 'B' and voce == 'Z' : score += 0 elif oponente == 'C' and voce == 'X' : score += 0 elif oponente == 'C' and voce == 'Y' : score += 0 elif oponente == 'C' and voce == 'Z' : score += 0

例子：

 if oponente == 'A' : if voce == 'X' : score += 0 elif voce == 'Y' : score += 0 elif voce == 'Z' : score += 0 elif oponente == 'B' : if voce == 'X' : score += 0 elif voce == 'Y' : score += 0 elif voce == 'Z' : score += 0 elif oponente == 'C' if voce == 'X' : score += 0 elif voce == 'Y' : score += 0 elif voce == 'Z' : score += 0

例子：

 scores = { ( 'A' , 'X' ): 0 , ( 'A' , 'Y' ): 0 , ( 'A' , 'Z' ): 0 , ( 'B' , 'X' ): 0 , ( 'B' , 'Y' ): 0 , ( 'B' , 'Z' ): 0 , ( 'C' , 'X' ): 0 , ( 'C' , 'Y' ): 0 , ( 'C' , 'Z' ): 0 , } score += scores [ oponente , voce ]

为 implementado em cima de uma árvore de busca binária (algo com alguma semelhante a uma BTreeMap do Rust ) 选择 teria um desempenho semelhante a solução de if anilhados, se for implementado em cima de uma tabela de espalhamento (estrutura HashMap do Rust ) se resumiria a calcular um hash em cima dos dados e acessar diretamente o valor desejado, o que poderia ser um desempenho ótimo para todas as condições, so dependendo da eficiência do cálculo da hash.

考虑事项

没有 Python 不存在一个可能的工具，一个应用程序，它的功能一直在使用 tabela de espalhamento，e por isso valores que não podem ser convertidos para hash não podem ser utilizados como chaves（官方文件）。

E todas essas otimizações fazem pouquíssima diferença para esse problema, mas essas mesmas ideias podem ser aplicadas a outros problemas e lá trazerem diferenças significativas. E todas essas otimizações fazem pouquíssima diferença para esse problema, mass essas mesmas ideias podem ser aplicadas a outros problemas e lá trazerem diferenças significativas. Estou usando esse problema só como desculpa para falar desses detalhes. Estou usando esse problema só como desculpa para falar deses detalhes。



原文:

Segundo dia do Advent of Code deste ano, na questão de optimização do algoritmo, ele tem bastante semelhança com o dia 1 sobre tratar a entrada, mas tem uma questão que acredito que vale uma observação no seu processamento.

O problema do dia 2

O problema do dia 2 "pedra papel tesoura" consiste basicamente em transcrever as regras do jogo de mesmo nome para um algoritmo que processe seus resultados. Novamente recomendo que tentem resolver o desafio primeiro, e o vídeo do Bruno Rocha:

Questão - Sequência de condições

Na solução apresentada pelo Bruno Rocha foi utilizado o match do Rust para definir a pontuação ganha em cada rodada. Nem todas as linguagens têm essa estrutura de controle (ou um switch ... case que poderia substituí-lo em alguns casos), mas é possível fazer algo similar utilizando if. Exemplo:

if oponente == 'A' and voce == 'X': score += 0
elif oponente == 'A' and voce == 'Y': score += 0
elif oponente == 'A' and voce == 'Z': score += 0
elif oponente == 'B' and voce == 'X': score += 0
elif oponente == 'B' and voce == 'Y': score += 0
elif oponente == 'B' and voce == 'Z': score += 0
elif oponente == 'C' and voce == 'X': score += 0
elif oponente == 'C' and voce == 'Y': score += 0
elif oponente == 'C' and voce == 'Z': score += 0

Um ponto dessa abordagem é que para resultados que tem sua condição verificada mais no início, como A X, tendem a ser computados mais rápido que condições verificadas mais para o final, como C Z. Dependendo do ambiente, se confidencialidade for importante, por exemplo, medir o tempo de cálculo poderia vazar quais foram as opções escolhidas, quebrando a confidencialidade (mas não é o caso aqui). Isso pode ser contornado trocando todos os elif para if, o que faria todas as opções ficarem mais lentas iguais, já que toda vez todas as condições seriam verificadas.

Mas considerando reduzir o tempo de execução, usar if aninhados é uma outra abordagem possível. Exemplo:

if oponente == 'A': if voce == 'X': score += 0 elif voce == 'Y': score += 0 elif voce == 'Z': score += 0
elif oponente == 'B': if voce == 'X': score += 0 elif voce == 'Y': score += 0 elif voce == 'Z': score += 0
elif oponente == 'C' if voce == 'X': score += 0 elif voce == 'Y': score += 0 elif voce == 'Z': score += 0

Assim, em vez de ter que passar por 9 condições até chegar na opção C Z (pior caso), seriam necessário apenas 6 condições, sendo que as demais combinações também tem ganhos.

Outra abordagem em vez de usar if, como o Bruno comentou, seria utilizando estruturas como mapas ou dicionários (o nome varia de acordo com a linguagem). Exemplo:

scores = { ('A', 'X'): 0, ('A', 'Y'): 0, ('A', 'Z'): 0, ('B', 'X'): 0, ('B', 'Y'): 0, ('B', 'Z'): 0, ('C', 'X'): 0, ('C', 'Y'): 0, ('C', 'Z'): 0,
} score += scores[oponente, voce]

O desempenho dessa solução depende da estrutura de dados utilizada para implementar o mapa/dicionário. Se ele for implementado em cima de uma árvore de busca binária (algo com alguma semelhante a uma BTreeMap do Rust) teria um desempenho semelhante a solução de if anilhados, se for implementado em cima de uma tabela de espalhamento (estrutura HashMap do Rust) se resumiria a calcular um hash em cima dos dados e acessar diretamente o valor desejado, o que poderia ser um desempenho ótimo para todas as condições, só dependendo da eficiência do cálculo da hash.

Olhando para a questão do Rust agora, é possível que BTreeMap tenha um desempenho melhor do que o HashMap, por ser poucos dados e não precisar chamar a função de hash. E sobre o match, não sei como ele foi implementado na linguagem, se ele seguiria uma ordem sequencial, como na primeira abordagem mostrada, ou se conseguiria fazer alguma otimização como no if aninhado. Porém para as poucas condições do problema a diferença no tempo seria mínima.

Considerações

Nos exemplos foram utilizados valores 0, por não ser o foco da discussão, e seus valores mudar na parte 1 e 2, mas uma implementação real para resolver o problema traria os pontos ganhos em cada condição.

Para um universo de 9 possibilidades diferentes, como no problema do dia 2 do Advent of Code, qualquer uma das soluções apresentadas vai conseguir atender. Porém isso não muda o fato de algumas serem mais otimizadas que outras, e que a lógica utilizada poderiam ser reaproveitada, e que conseguiriam lidar melhor com problemas onde existem muito mais possibilidades a serem analisadas.

Também existe uma discussão se seria mais eficiente tratar a string inteira ('A X'), ou processar isso e tratar como tuplas (('A', 'X')). Em outros casos poderia ser tratar direto a string, ou converter para um número inteiro. Quanto menos conversões necessárias melhor, porém as vezes isso poderia mudar a complexidade de uma operação como comparação, o que valeria pagar o custo para converter o dado.

Infelizmente no Python não existe a possibilidade de escolher a implementação do dicionário, ele sempre funcionará como uma tabela de espalhamento, e por isso valores que não podem ser convertidos para hash não podem ser utilizados como chaves (documentação oficial).

E todas essas otimizações fazem pouquíssima diferença para esse problema, mas essas mesmas ideias podem ser aplicadas a outros problemas e lá trazerem diferenças significativas. Estou usando esse problema só como desculpa para falar desses detalhes.
item.author: eduardoklosowski

item.title: 使用 GitHub 风格的 markdown 编写更好的 README.md 文件 | Writing better README.md files using GitHub flavoured markdown
item.description:
伊玛目阿布巴卡尔

发表于在本文中，我们将了解 GitHub 风格的 markdown 必须提供的一些功能，以及如何在您自己的 README.md 文件中使用它们。

标题

例如：

 This is an H1 ============= This is an H2 -------------

您使用的#字符数决定标题级别， #为 h1， ##为 h2， ###为 h3，依此类推。 例如：

 # This is an H1 ## This is an H2 ### This is an H3 #### This is an H4 ##### This is an H5 ###### This is an H6

列表

有序列表是通过在列表项前加上数字前缀和句点来创建的。 例如：

  1. 第一项
  2. 第二项
  3. 第三项

无序列表是通过在列表项前加上- 、 +或*来创建的。 例如：这个

 - First item - Second item + Third item * Fourth item

将创建这些：

  • 第一项
  • 第二项
  • 第三项
  • 第四项

图片

图像是通过用![](...)围绕图像 URL 创建的。 例如：

 ![GitHub Logo](/images/logo.png)

代码块

代码块是通过用 3 (`) 块包围代码来创建的。 例如：

function foo() { console.log("foo"); }

表

表是使用|创建的字符创建列和-字符创建行。 例如：

这些：
| Column 1 | Column 2 | Column 3 | |----------|----------|----------| | Row 1 | Row 2 | Row 3 | | Row 4 | Row 5 | Row 6 |
将创建这些：

第 1 列第 2 栏第 3 栏
第 1 行第 2 行第 3 行
第 4 行第 5 行第 6 行

表情符号

例如， :smile:将被替换为

![](https://github.githubassets.com/images/icons/emoji/unicode/1f604.png).

结论

在本文中，我们了解了 GitHub 风格的 markdown 必须提供的一些功能，以及如何在您自己的 README.md 文件中使用它们。

资源

  • 表情符号备忘单

中村健一郎—— 一旦暂停，abubakardev 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，abubakardev 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，abubakardev 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 abubakardev 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 abubakardev：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 abubakardev 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Imam Abubakar

Posted on Dec 2

GitHub flavoured markdown is a set of extensions to the standard markdown syntax that gives you some cool features to make your README.md files look great on GitHub. In this article, we'll look at some of the features that GitHub flavoured markdown has to offer and how you can use them in your own README.md files.

README.md Formatting

Headings

GitHub flavoured markdown supports two types of headings: setext and atx.

Setext headings are created by underlining the heading text with = for h1 headings and - for h2 headings. For example:

This is an H1
=============

This is an H2
-------------

Atx headings are created by surrounding the heading text with # characters. The number of # characters you use determines the heading level, with # being h1, ## being h2, ### being h3, and so on. For example:

# This is an H1

## This is an H2

### This is an H3

#### This is an H4

##### This is an H5

###### This is an H6

Lists

GitHub flavoured markdown supports both ordered and unordered lists.

Ordered lists are created by prefixing the list items with numbers followed by a period. For example:

  1. First item
  2. Second item
  3. Third item

Unordered lists are created by prefixing the list items with -, +, or *. For example: This

- First item
- Second item
+ Third item
* Fourth item

will create these:

  • First item
  • Second item
  • Third item
  • Fourth item

Images

Images are created by surrounding the image URL with ![](...). The text inside the [...] is used as the image alt text. For example:

![GitHub Logo](/images/logo.png)

Code Blocks

Code blocks are created by surrounding the code with blocks of 3 (`) . For example:

function foo() { console.log("foo"); }

Tables

Tables are created by using the | character to create columns and the - character to create rows. For example:

These:
| Column 1 | Column 2 | Column 3 | |----------|----------|----------| | Row 1 | Row 2 | Row 3 | | Row 4 | Row 5 | Row 6 |
will create these:

Column 1 Column 2 Column 3
Row 1 Row 2 Row 3
Row 4 Row 5 Row 6

Emoji

GitHub flavoured markdown supports emoji! 😄 To use emoji, simply type the emoji code 😄 and it will be replaced with the emoji image. For example, :smile: will be replaced with

![](https://github.githubassets.com/images/icons/emoji/unicode/1f604.png).

Conclusion

GitHub flavoured markdown is a great way to make your README.md files look great on GitHub. In this article, we've looked at some of the features that GitHub flavoured markdown has to offer and how you can use them in your own README.md files.

Resources

  • GitHub Flavored Markdown Spec
  • Emoji Cheat Sheet

Kenichiro Nakamura - Oct 5

Once unsuspended, abubakardev will be able to comment and publish posts again.

If abubakardev is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.title: 更大的计划 | Plans for something bigger
item.description:
嘿！

这周，我一直在寻找可以钓到的更大的鱼，那就是做比以前更大的事情。

到目前为止，我的开源之旅一直在做或多或少简单的事情，以便更好地了解社区，并正确掌握我的工具知识。 所以，现在我对自己（在开源贡献方面）和我的技能相当有信心，终于到了更加努力工作的时候了。

在我的案例中，有什么比实施新功能而不是修复视觉错误听起来更完美？ 确切地！ 所以，我最初的计划是给自己找一个需要编写新代码的问题，而不是修复现有的东西。 是时候找点事情做了。

项目与问题

搜索了几个小时后，我发现了一个非常吸引我的问题。

它位于一个名为Wego Overseer的 repo 中，它似乎是特定社区的 Discord 机器人。 聊天机器人一直是我想尝试的东西，这听起来是个绝好的机会！

问题本身是关于实现聊天投票功能，该功能可以通过消息下的表情符号反应来完成。 这对我来说就像是我一直在寻找的东西，挑战我的技能，而且不像我以前的贡献那么容易。

我的实施计划

在直接开始编码之前，我将不得不检查该项目并对其使用的工具进行一些研究，例如 Discord.js、knex 和 Objection。

首先，我必须在本地设置它并使其运行。 然后，我将对其进行一些测试以了解其工作方式。

设置完成后，我将通读有关我之前提到的工具的文档。 一旦我掌握了它们的使用方式，我将尝试设计我的解决方案，即民意调查创建者用户体验的感受，民意调查的外观，它将使用什么逻辑来显示民意调查结果，想想其他细节等

在我的解决方案在纸面上看起来不错并且我对如何实现它有了感觉之后，我将开始编码。 我会先尝试创建一个新命令，然后逐渐尝试将其变成我设计的样子。

希望一切顺利！



原文:

Hey there!

This week, I've been looking for some bigger fish to catch, that being doing something bigger than I did before.

My open source journey so far has been doing more or less simple things, in order to get to know the community better, and get my tool knowledge up right. So, now that I am fairly confident in myself (in terms of Open Source contributing) and my skills, it is finally time to get working harder.

What sounds more perfect in my case than implementing a new feature instead of fixing a visual bug? Exactly! So, my initial plan was to find myself an issue that required to write new code, instead of fixing the existing stuff. It was time to find something to work on.

Project and issue

After searching for a couple of hours, I found an issue that appealed a lot to me.

It was in a repo called Wego Overseer, which appears to be a Discord bot for a specific community. Chat bots have always been something I wanted to try, and this sounded like a perfect opportunity!

The issue itself was about implementing a chat poll feature that could be done via emoji-reactions under a message. This felt to me like something I have been searching for, challenging my skills and not as easy as my previous contributions.

My plan for implementation

Before jumping right into coding, I will have to examine the project and do some research about the tools it uses, such as Discord.js, knex, and Objection.

First things first, I will have to set it up locally and get it running. Then, I'll test it a bit to sense the way it works.

After setting up, I will read through documentation on the tools I have mentioned before. Once I get a hang of how they are used, I will try to design my solution, i.e. how the poll creator UX will feel, how the poll will look like, what logic it will be using in order to show poll results, think of other details, etc.

After my solution is looking good on paper, and I have a feeling of how to implement it, I will start coding. I will try to create a new command first, and then gradually try turning it into how I designed it.

Hoping it goes well!
item.author: devils2ndself

item.title: 查找排序数组中元素的第一个和最后一个位置 | Find First and Last Position of Element in Sorted Array
item.description:
发表于加入 DEV并分享您的故事。

哈菲兹·穆罕默德·比拉勒 - 穆罕默德·阿兹法尔·阿斯拉姆 - 一旦暂停，zeeshanali0704 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，zeeshanali0704 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

取消发布后，zeeshanali0704 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 zeeshanali0704 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 zeeshanali0704 的方法：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 zeeshanali0704 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

ZeeshanAli-0704

Posted on Dec 3 

/** * @param {number[]} nums * @param {number} target * @return {number[]} */
var searchRange = function (nums, target) { const firstOcurance = searchFirstOccurance(nums, target); const lastOcurrance = searchLastOccurance(nums, target); if (firstOcurance === -1) { return [-1, -1]; } else { return [firstOcurance, lastOcurrance]; }
}; var searchFirstOccurance = function (nums, target) { let high = nums.length - 1; let low = 0; while (low <= high) { let mid = parseInt((low + high) / 2); if (nums[mid] > target) { high = mid - 1; } else if (nums[mid] < target) { low = mid + 1; } else { if (mid === 0 || nums[mid - 1] !== nums[mid]) { return mid; } else { high = mid - 1; } } } return -1;
};
var searchLastOccurance = function (nums, target) { let high = nums.length - 1; let low = 0; while (low <= high) { let mid = parseInt((low + high) / 2); if (nums[mid] > target) { high = mid - 1; } else if (nums[mid] < target) { low = mid + 1; } else { if (mid === nums.length - 1 || nums[mid] !== nums[mid + 1]) { return mid; } else { low = mid + 1; } } } return -1;
}; console.log(searchRange([5, 7, 7, 8, 8, 10], 8));

Muhammad Azfar Aslam - Nov 1

item.title: 在排序的二进制数组中计算 1 | Count 1's in a Sorted Binary Array
item.description:
发表于下面的代码是通用的，可用于查找任何数字的出现，前提是数组仅使用 2 个唯一元素进行排序

var getOneCount = function ( nums , target ) { let high = nums . length - 1 ; let low = 0 ; while ( low <= high ) { let mid = parseInt (( low + high ) / 2 ); if ( nums [ mid ] > target ) { high = mid - 1 ; } else if ( nums [ mid ] < target ) { low = mid + 1 ; } else { if ( mid === 0 || nums [ mid - 1 ] !== nums [ mid ]) { return nums . length - mid ; } else { high = mid - 1 ; } } } return - 1 ; }; console . log ( getOneCount ([ 0 , 0 , 1 , 1 , 1 , 1 , 1 ], 1 ));

作为 JavaScript 开发者，我们通常不必自己处理编译器。 然而，了解 JavaScript 引擎的基础知识并了解它如何处理我们对人类友好的 JS 代码并将其转化为机器可以理解的代码绝对是一件好事！ 编码愉快！

艾哈迈德·阿卜杜拉·埃尔比拉尔 - 一旦暂停，zeeshanali0704 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

原文:

ZeeshanAli-0704

Posted on Dec 3

Below code is generic can be used to find occurrences of any number provided array is sorted with only 2 unique element

var getOneCount = function (nums, target) { let high = nums.length - 1; let low = 0; while (low <= high) { let mid = parseInt((low + high) / 2); if (nums[mid] > target) { high = mid - 1; } else if (nums[mid] < target) { low = mid + 1; } else { if (mid === 0 || nums[mid - 1] !== nums[mid]) { return nums.length - mid; } else { high = mid - 1; } } } return -1;
}; console.log(getOneCount([0, 0, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1], 1));

item.title: React TypeScript：外部点击检测器 | React TypeScript: Outside Click Detector
item.description:
拉利特亚达夫

发表于我们想要编写一个类型安全的外部点击检测器组件，它可以包裹在任何组件周围以侦听外部点击。 此外，当用户按下 Escape 关闭模式或下拉菜单时，我们还将监听按键情况。

要求

我们的高阶组件 (HOC) 应该支持两个基本的组合使用功能

  1. 我们可以使用前向 Ref； 反应方式或，
  2. 我们可以使用 document.getElementById 来监听点击

让我们为 HOC 的 props 定义我们的接口

export interface IClickOutsideProps { children : React . ReactNode wrapperId : string ? // Id of our outside wrapper where we will listen for click listen : boolean // Toggle to listen for click onClickOutside : () => void // }

此外，我们的功能需求我们还应该定义我们的非功能需求

  1. 我们应该能够使用鼠标事件进行交互
  2. 我们应该能够使用键盘进行交互
  3. 我们也应该能够支持触摸事件

执行
现在，让我们围绕 prop 定义编写我们的基本组件。 但是，我们缺少 ref 但是，我们不能简单地将它作为 prop 传递，我们需要使用 React 的 forwardRefAPI，在继续之前，让我们快速回顾一下 React 关于 Ref 转发的文档

我们需要对我们的组件进行类型安全，所以让我们编写一个满足我们要求的基本组件。

 // Defining our imports import React , { useEffect , useRef , forwardRef , ForwardedRef , MutableRefObject } from ' react '

如果我们从 React 的定义中回忆 forwardRef 的函数定义是React.forwardRef((props, ref) => React.ReactNode)我们已经将我们的 props 类型定义为IClickOutsideDetectorProps ，对于 ref，我们已经从 React 导入了ForwardRef . 那么， ref: ForwardRef应该可以正常工作吗？ 还不算，我们仍然需要为 ForwardRef 定义内部泛型。 我们的组件应该是这样的

const ClickOutsideDetector = forwardRef (( props : IClickOutsideDetectorProps , ref : ForwardedRef < HTMLDivElement > ) => { })

让我们花点时间考虑一下我们的功能需求。 我们应该能够将 HOC 与 ref 或 HTML 节点 ID 一起使用来选择我们的节点。

当我们有了我们的包装器元素时，我们使用巧妙的技巧来检查包装器是否包含发生点击的元素，如果是，我们返回，否则我们运行回调

const ClickOutsideDetector = forwardRef (( props : IClickOutsideDetectorProps , ref : ForwardedRef < HTMLDivElement > ) => { const { children , listen , wrapperId , onClickOutside } = props const container = ref || useRef < HTMLDivElement > ( null ) const handleEvent = ( e : MouseEvent ) => { if (( container as MutableRefObject < HTMLDivElement > ). current . contains ( e . target as Node )) return const wrapperElm = document . getElementById ( wrapperId ) if ( wrapperElm && wrapperElm . contains ( e . target as Node )) return onClickOutside () } return < div ref = { container } > { children } < /div > })

好的，HOC 已经有了我们的逻辑，我们仍然需要处理 MouseEvent、KeyboardEvent 和 Touch 事件。

 const ClickOutsideDetector = forwardRef (( props : IClickOutsideDetectorProps , ref : ForwardedRef < HTMLDivElement > ) => { const { children , listen , wrapperId , onClickOutside } = props const container = ref || useRef < HTMLDivElement > ( null ) const onKeyUp = ( e : KeyboardEvent ) => { if ( e . code === ' Escape ' ) onClickOutside () } const handleEvent = ( e : KeyboardEvent | MouseEvent | TouchEvent ) => { if (( container as MutableRefObject < HTMLDivElement > ). current . contains ( e . target as Node )) return const wrapperElm = document . getElementById ( wrapperId ) if ( wrapperElm && wrapperElm . contains ( e . target as Node )) return onClickOutside () } useEffect (() => { if ( listen ) { document . addEventListener ( ' mousedown ' , handleEvent , false ) document . addEventListener ( ' touchend ' , handleEvent , false ) document . addEventListener ( ' keyup ' , onKeyUp , false ) } return () => { document . removeEventListener ( ' mousedown ' , handleEvent , false ) document . removeEventListener ( ' touchend ' , handleEvent , false ) document . removeEventListener ( ' keyup ' , onKeyUp , false ) } }) return < div ref = { container } > { children } < /div > }) // For debugging ClickOutsideDetector . displayName = ' ClickOutsideDetector '

测试我们可以简单地通过使用下面的 ReactTestingLibrary 来测试我们的组件。 这里就不多解释了，代码自解释

import React , { createRef , useState } from ' react ' import { render , screen } from ' @testing-library/react ' import userEvent from ' @testing-library/user-event ' import ' @testing-library/jest-dom ' import { ClickOutsideDetector } from ' ./index ' const TestComponent = () => { const [ isOpen , setIsOpen ] = useState ( true ) const containerRef = createRef < HTMLDivElement > () const handleClickOutSide = () => setIsOpen ( false ) return ( < div > < div data - testid = ' clickableArea ' > < button > Click happens here < /button > < /div > < div id = ' wrapperId ' > < ClickOutsideDetector ref = { containerRef } wrapperId = ' wrapperId ' listen = { true } onClickOutside = { handleClickOutSide } > < p data - testid = ' renderedItem ' > { isOpen ? ' open ' : ' closed ' } < /p > < /ClickOutsideDetector > < /div > < /div > ) } describe ( ' Running functional test for ClickOutsideDetector ' , () => { test ( ' Check if ClickOutside is working on Click ' , async () => { render ( < TestComponent /> ) expect ( screen . getByTestId ( ' renderedItem ' )). toHaveTextContent ( ' open ' ) await userEvent . click ( screen . getByTestId ( ' clickableArea ' )) expect ( screen . getByTestId ( ' renderedItem ' )). toHaveTextContent ( ' closed ' ) }) test ( ' Check if ClickOutside is working on Keyboard ' , async () => { render ( < TestComponent /> ) expect ( screen . getByTestId ( ' renderedItem ' )). toHaveTextContent ( ' open ' ) await userEvent . keyboard ( ' {Escape} ' ) expect ( screen . getByTestId ( ' renderedItem ' )). toHaveTextContent ( ' closed ' ) }) })

如果您喜欢这篇文章或有任何意见，请随时发表评论。 编码愉快！

塞巴斯蒂安·诺比利 - 格洛丽亚马尔多纳多 ✪ - 一旦暂停，rise3107 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，rise3107 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，rise3107 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 rise3107 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 rise3107：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 rise3107 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Lalit Yadav

Posted on Dec 2

We want to write a type safe outside click detector component that can be wrapped around any component to listen for an outside click. Additionally, we will also listen for keypress for the scenarios when the user presses Escape to close a modal, or dropdown.

Requirements

Our Higher Order Component(HOC) should support two basic functionality for compositive usage

  1. We can use forward Ref; React way or,
  2. We can use document.getElementById to listen for the click

Let's define our Interface for the props for our HOC

export interface IClickOutsideProps { children: React.ReactNode wrapperId: string? // Id of our outside wrapper where we will listen for click listen: boolean // Toggle to listen for click onClickOutside: () => void // 
}

Besides, our functional requirements we should also define our non-functional requirements

  1. We should be able to use Mouse events to interact
  2. We should be able to use the keyboard to interact
  3. We should be able to support touch events as well

Implementation
Now, let's write our basic component around the prop definition. But, we are missing ref But, we cannot simply pass it as a prop, we will need to use React's forwardRefAPI and before continuing, let's do a quick refresher on React's documentation on Ref forwarding

Ref forwarding is an opt-in feature that lets some components take ref they receive and pass it further down (in other words, "forward" it) to a child. Example from React's documentation

const FancyButton = React.forwardRef((props, ref) => ( <button ref={ref} className="FancyButton"> {props.children} </button>
)); // You can now get a ref directly to the DOM button:
const ref = React.createRef();
<FancyButton ref={ref}>Click me!</FancyButton>;

We need to typeSafe our component so let's write a fundamental component that satisfies our requirements.

// Defining our imports
import React, { useEffect, useRef, forwardRef, ForwardedRef, MutableRefObject } from 'react'

If we recall the function definition for forwardRef from React's definition is React.forwardRef((props, ref) => React.ReactNode) We already have the type of our props defined earlier as IClickOutsideDetectorProps , for ref, we have already imported ForwardRef from React. So, ref: ForwardRef should work right? Not quite yet, we still need to define the inner generic type for our ForwardRef. Our component should look like this

const ClickOutsideDetector = forwardRef((props: IClickOutsideDetectorProps, ref: ForwardedRef<HTMLDivElement>) => { })

Let's take a moment and think about our functional requirements. We should be able to use HOC with the ref or with HTML Node id to select our Node.

When we have our wrapper element we use the neat trick to check if the wrapper contains the element where the click happened if yes we return otherwise we run the callback

const ClickOutsideDetector = forwardRef((props: IClickOutsideDetectorProps, ref: ForwardedRef<HTMLDivElement>) => { const { children, listen, wrapperId, onClickOutside } = props const container = ref || useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null) const handleEvent = (e: MouseEvent) => { if ((container as MutableRefObject<HTMLDivElement>).current.contains(e.target as Node)) return const wrapperElm = document.getElementById(wrapperId) if (wrapperElm && wrapperElm.contains(e.target as Node)) return onClickOutside() } return <div ref={container}>{children}</div>
})

Okay, HOC has our logic in place we still need to handle MouseEvent, KeyboardEvent, and Touch events.

const ClickOutsideDetector = forwardRef((props: IClickOutsideDetectorProps, ref: ForwardedRef<HTMLDivElement>) => { const { children, listen, wrapperId, onClickOutside } = props const container = ref || useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null) const onKeyUp = (e: KeyboardEvent) => { if (e.code === 'Escape') onClickOutside() } const handleEvent = (e: KeyboardEvent | MouseEvent | TouchEvent) => { if ((container as MutableRefObject<HTMLDivElement>).current.contains(e.target as Node)) return const wrapperElm = document.getElementById(wrapperId) if (wrapperElm && wrapperElm.contains(e.target as Node)) return onClickOutside() } useEffect(() => { if (listen) { document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleEvent, false) document.addEventListener('touchend', handleEvent, false) document.addEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp, false) } return () => { document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleEvent, false) document.removeEventListener('touchend', handleEvent, false) document.removeEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp, false) } }) return <div ref={container}>{children}</div>
}) // For debugging
ClickOutsideDetector.displayName = 'ClickOutsideDetector'

Testing We can test our component simply by using ReactTestingLibrary underneath. There is not much to explain here, the code is self-explanatory

import React, { createRef, useState } from 'react'
import { render, screen } from '@testing-library/react'
import userEvent from '@testing-library/user-event'
import '@testing-library/jest-dom' import { ClickOutsideDetector } from './index' const TestComponent = () => { const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(true) const containerRef = createRef<HTMLDivElement>() const handleClickOutSide = () => setIsOpen(false) return ( <div> <div data-testid='clickableArea'> <button>Click happens here</button>
 </div>
 <div id='wrapperId'> <ClickOutsideDetector ref={containerRef} wrapperId='wrapperId' listen={true} onClickOutside={handleClickOutSide} > <p data-testid='renderedItem'>{isOpen ? 'open' : 'closed'}</p>
 </ClickOutsideDetector>
 </div>
 </div>
 )
} describe('Running functional test for ClickOutsideDetector', () => { test('Check if ClickOutside is working on Click', async () => { render(<TestComponent />) expect(screen.getByTestId('renderedItem')).toHaveTextContent('open') await userEvent.click(screen.getByTestId('clickableArea')) expect(screen.getByTestId('renderedItem')).toHaveTextContent('closed') }) test('Check if ClickOutside is working on Keyboard', async () => { render(<TestComponent />) expect(screen.getByTestId('renderedItem')).toHaveTextContent('open') await userEvent.keyboard('{Escape}') expect(screen.getByTestId('renderedItem')).toHaveTextContent('closed') })
})

If you enjoy the article or have any comments please feel free to comment. Happy coding!

Sébastien NOBILI - Nov 29

Gloria Maldonado ✪ - Nov 28
